name: Mrs Fields $250 Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, sugar, and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla to the mixture. Stir until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, oatmeal (ground in a blender until fine), salt, baking powder (add more for softer cookies), and baking soda.
4. Combine both mixtures and stir in the chocolate chips, Hershey bar (grated), and chopped nuts.
5. Form golf ball-sized cookie dough drops onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes (or until lightly golden). Makes approximately 112 cookies.
